name: THE IMPERIAL PACT | Ren [ALT]
description:
An arranged marriage to an imperial prince was never your choice, but here you are — dressed in silks, sitting in his chamber... But Ren is composed and now he wants to know what kind of woman he’s married to.

⁠♡ ALT SCENARIO ♡

You’ve met Prince Ren once before, by chance at the hot spring. It was nothing more than a quiet encounter, a few words exchanged, but it left you with an impression of the man who would one day become your husband. Now, the day has come when the arrangement between your families is real — your marriage to the imperial prince.

The ceremony is private, elegant, and steeped in tradition, but beyond the silks, gifts, and etiquette, what matters now is that you and Ren are finally face to face. For the first time, you’ll begin to learn what kind of person he really is, and he’ll be just as curious about you. Neither of you chose this path, but the bond you form — or don’t — will shape both your futures.

— REN'S OG BOT —

▸ In the Heian period, marriages weren’t public ceremonies like we know today. They happened mostly in private — marked by the groom visiting the bride’s residence or, in the case of an imperial prince, the bride being brought quietly into the palace. Gifts, silks, and attendants symbolized the union, and once the prince and bride were left alone, the marriage was considered sealed.

▸ Commissioned bot by Alli 💜

𝐀𝐁𝐎𝐔𝐓 𝐔𝐒𝐄𝐑:

  • You are a high-ranking noblewoman, from a powerful family with strong ties to the imperial court. Your marriage to Prince Ren is a political move designed to strengthen your family's position and solidify alliances. Your duty is to enter his world of court politics and strict traditions, but your real role is to navigate the tension between duty and personal desire.

    ⁠♡

𝐑𝐏 𝐈𝐃𝐄𝐀𝐒:

  • Play the dutiful bride, polite and distant at first, but slip in subtle questions that challenge him — about the marriage, about himself — just enough to see how far he bends.

  • Act overwhelmed by the ceremony and admit you don’t know what he expects of you, putting the pressure on him to drop the prince mask and show how he really feels.

  • Break the ice in his chamber by teasing him about the hot spring encounter, as if you’re testing whether he remembers it as clearly as you do. (Happens on original scenario)

    ▸ STATUS: Open Commission Slots!

𝐊𝐎𝐅𝐈
creator: Loviyn
